_note: Reusable roster for Sawasdee Cellars calls — Nick (founder) + a rotating cast of AU wine PRODUCERS (one per call) and Thai-side / advisor contacts. The producer changes per call, so producers are NOT fixed speakers here; the detected speaker count catches the extra voice and you name them per-recording (add a {name, profile, anchor} in the per-call speakers.json copied from this roster). Standing cast: Nick always; Robin (AU co-founder) and Sai (Thai-side) may appear. GLOSSARY GROWTH LOOP: whenever a producer call surfaces a new garbled term (a winemaker's name, a varietal, a wine name, a trade term), append the CORRECT spelling here the same session — call #N+1 inherits every catch. Born 2026-07-20 from the Werkstatt/Bridget call, where whole-track loudnorm dropped the quiet phone-line speaker until dynaudnorm was added to the pipeline conditioning step.
title: Sawasdee Cellars producer / market call
context: A phone or in-person conversation for Sawasdee Cellars, an Australia-to-Thailand boutique-wine export venture run through Enspyr Pty Ltd. Nick Meinhold (founder) talks with an Australian wine producer about supplying wine ex-winery for consolidation into a reefer container to Thailand and placement in a catalogue for the Thai distributor IWS — or with an advisor / Thai-side contact about market strategy, logistics, or the deal model. Topics: wine ranges, styles suited to the Thai heat (light, aromatic, chillable), volumes and pallets, ex-winery / FOB pricing, WET-free export invoicing, cold-chain reefer freight, samples.

speakers.name: Nick
speakers.profile: Founder of Sawasdee Cellars (Enspyr Pty Ltd). Drives the pitch: Thai export, the IWS distributor, buy-ex-winery / consolidate / reefer-freight model. Asks about range, volume, pallets, price, availability, samples. Warm, enthusiastic, Australian. Grew up in the Yarra Valley.
